<div class="sphinxpress-doc">
<section id="safe-epub-rebuilds">
<h1>Safe EPUB rebuilds</h1>
<p>The rebuild workflow applies text replacements to an existing EPUB using an extraction manifest. It is designed for automated translation or post-processing systems that must preserve source package entries whenever possible.</p>
<section id="replacement-plan">
<h2>Replacement plan</h2>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">pathlib</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">Path</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">text2epub</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">Replacement</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ReplacementPlan</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">rebuild_epub</span>

<span class="n">report</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">rebuild_epub</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">ReplacementPlan</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">source_epub</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;source.epub&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">extraction_manifest</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;manifest.json&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">replacements</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">[</span>
            <span class="n">Replacement</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">block_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;spine-0001:block-000001&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Translated paragraph.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">expected_source</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Original paragraph.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">allow_inline_xhtml</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;rebuilt.epub&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
<span class="p">)</span>

<span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">report</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">changed_entries</span><span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="manifest-shape">
<h2>Manifest shape</h2>
<p>The extraction manifest can be supplied as a mapping or JSON file. The expected schema is intentionally small:</p>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;schema_version&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;source_sha256&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;sha256-of-source-epub&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;entries&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;href&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;OEBPS/Text/chapter01.xhtml&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;media_type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;application/xhtml+xml&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;spine_index&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;raw_sha256&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;sha256-of-entry-bytes&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;blocks&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="nt">&quot;block_id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;spine-0001:block-000001&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="nt">&quot;text&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Original paragraph.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="nt">&quot;source_start&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">128</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="nt">&quot;source_end&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">147</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="nt">&quot;replacement_mode&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;text_node_sequence&quot;</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">source_sha256</span></code> and <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">raw_sha256</span></code> are optional, but strongly recommended. When present, they protect against applying replacements to the wrong source file or a stale ZIP entry.</p>
</section>
<section id="replacement-modes">
<h2>Replacement modes</h2>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">text_node_sequence</span></code> replaces the byte-decoded text range from <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">source_start</span></code> to <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">source_end</span></code>.</p>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">whole_block_body</span></code> replaces <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">body_source_start</span></code> to <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">body_source_end</span></code> when present, otherwise it falls back to <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">source_start</span></code> and <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">source_end</span></code>. This mode supports safe inline XHTML fragments.</p>
</section>
<section id="safety-checks">
<h2>Safety checks</h2>
<p>A rebuild fails when:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p>the source EPUB fails basic package validation,</p></li>
<li><p>the manifest source hash does not match the source EPUB,</p></li>
<li><p>a replacement references an unknown or duplicate block,</p></li>
<li><p>source offsets are missing, invalid, outside the entry, or overlapping,</p></li>
<li><p>the current source fragment differs from the manifest fragment,</p></li>
<li><p>a replacement leaks configured internal placeholder tokens,</p></li>
<li><p>an inline XHTML fragment contains forbidden tags, attributes, event handlers, JavaScript links, or malformed XML.</p></li>
</ul>
<p>No-op plans and identity replacements copy the source EPUB without rewriting entries. Rebuilds do not operate in place; use a distinct output path.</p>
</section>
<section id="output-rewrite-language-and-css">
<h2>Output rewrite (language and CSS)</h2>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">rebuild_epub</span></code> accepts an optional <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">OutputRewriteOptions</span></code> through
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">ReplacementPlan.output_rewrite</span></code>. It is the supported way to update
publication-level metadata when replacement text changes the publication
language, and to inject deterministic, caller-owned CSS. text2epub does not
choose a target language or interpret injected CSS - those concerns stay with
the caller.</p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">text2epub</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">OutputRewriteOptions</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ReplacementPlan</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">rebuild_epub</span>

<span class="n">report</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">rebuild_epub</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">ReplacementPlan</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">source_epub</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;source.epub&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">output_rewrite</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">OutputRewriteOptions</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;es&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">patch_package_language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">patch_content_language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">css_text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;p { hyphens: auto; }&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;rebuilt.epub&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span>
<span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">report</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">output_rewrite</span><span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>When <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">output_rewrite</span></code> is <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">None</span></code>, or the options request no effective change
(no language patch flag set and <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">css_text</span> <span class="pre">is</span> <span class="pre">None</span></code>), the rebuild preserves
current copy and byte-identity behavior exactly.</p>
<section id="language">
<h3>Language</h3>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">language</span></code> is required when any of <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">patch_package_language</span></code>,
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">patch_content_language</span></code>, or <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">patch_body_language</span></code> is enabled.</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">patch_package_language</span></code> updates the primary OPF <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">dc:language</span></code> (adding one if
none exists, preserving additional distinct <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">dc:language</span></code> values).</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">patch_content_language</span></code> sets the root <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">html&#64;lang</span></code> and <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">html&#64;xml:lang</span></code>.</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">patch_body_language</span></code> additionally sets <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">body&#64;lang</span></code>/<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">body&#64;xml:lang</span></code> and is
invalid unless content language patching is enabled.</p></li>
<li><p>Existing descendant language attributes (for example a <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">lang=&quot;fr&quot;</span></code> quote) are
preserved.</p></li>
<li><p>Language tags are validated as BCP-47-style: empty, whitespace-only,
underscore-form, and otherwise syntactically invalid tags are rejected.</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
<section id="css">
<h3>CSS</h3>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">css_text</span></code> is caller-owned CSS. text2epub validates that it is text and injects
it as a single <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">&lt;style</span> <span class="pre">id=&quot;text2epub-output-policy&quot;</span> <span class="pre">type=&quot;text/css&quot;&gt;</span></code> element.</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">style_id</span></code> must be a valid XML/HTML id token.</p></li>
<li><p>Zero matching styles insert one at the end of <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">&lt;head&gt;</span></code>; one matching style
replaces its text; more than one is an error rather than an arbitrary repair.</p></li>
<li><p>A missing <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">&lt;head&gt;</span></code> is an error for a targeted XHTML document.</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">css_text=None</span></code> means do not inspect or change generated styles. An empty
string is an explicit request to remove an existing matching style.</p></li>
<li><p>Applying identical options twice produces one style and no semantic change
(idempotent).</p></li>
<li><p>CSS is skipped for fixed-layout content unless
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">inject_css_into_fixed_layout=True</span></code>. Language patching still applies to
fixed-layout XHTML.</p></li>
</ul>
<p>text2epub does <strong>not</strong> promise that injected CSS overrides source or reader
styles; rendered behavior depends on the reading system and is out of scope.</p>
</section>
<section id="content-targeting">
<h3>Content targeting</h3>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">content_scope</span></code> selects which XHTML documents the rewrite applies to:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">replacement-manifest</span></code> uses the unique XHTML hrefs from the extraction
manifest (requires a manifest even when there are no replacements).</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">spine</span></code> uses XHTML manifest items referenced by the spine, in spine order.</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">spine-and-navigation</span></code> (default) uses spine items plus the navigation
document, deduplicated in archive order.</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">explicit</span></code> uses <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">content_hrefs</span></code>, resolved relative to the OPF unless they
already name an exact archive member. Empty lists, duplicate or traversal
hrefs, hrefs absent from the manifest, non-XHTML targets, and archive
duplicate-name ambiguity are rejected.</p></li>
</ul>
<p>The OPF is located through <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">META-INF/container.xml</span></code>, so rebuilt sources are not
required to keep their package at <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">OEBPS/content.opf</span></code>.</p>
</section>
<section id="reporting-and-atomic-output">
<h3>Reporting and atomic output</h3>
<p>When a non-<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">None</span></code> rewrite object is supplied, <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">ReplacementReport.output_rewrite</span></code>
is populated with an <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">OutputRewriteReport</span></code> (with <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">applied=False</span></code> for an
effective no-op). <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">ReplacementReport.changed_entries</span></code> is the archive-order
union of block-replacement, OPF, content-language, and CSS changes;
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">replacement_count</span></code> continues to count requested block replacements only.</p>
<p>Output publication is atomic: a sibling temporary EPUB is written in the
destination directory, validated, and only then moved into place. On any
failure the temporary file is removed and an existing destination is left
untouched.</p>
</section>
</section>
</section>
</div>
{% endraw %}
